audit_items.proof_trace: Polynomial recovery and degree validation is implemented in external C library github.com/ethereum/c-kzg-4844/v2 (ckzg4844.RecoverCellsAndKZGProofs at L116). The Go code provides only a thin wrapper with type conversions. Mathematical correctness of the KZG polynomial recovery algorithm is outside the scope of the Prysm codebase audit.
